sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-08-05 17:14
- Distance: 10 km
- Moving time: 53:44
- Elapsed time: 55:36
- Elevation gain: 142.2 m
- Average heart rate: 162.6 bpm
- Max heart rate: 179 bpm
- Average watts: 235.2 W
- Average speed: 11.2 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `5` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `164.1 bpm`, ranging from `148.2` to `171.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `155.8 bpm` and second-half average HR was `169.7 bpm` (+14.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `169.9 spm`, with a working range of `103.6` to `177.7 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `164.9 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `172.0 spm` (+7.1 spm), which suggests turnover lifted rather than falling away.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:22 /km` across `10.017 km` in `53:44` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:11 /km` and second-half pace was `5:32 /km` (+21 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `162.6 bpm` average and `179 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `156.4 bpm` in the first half and `167.9 bpm` in the second (+11.4 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `53:44` out of `55:36` elapsed (96.6%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `8` stop segments and `0.9%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `163.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.8 m` and `71.0 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `52.8 m` in the first half and `111.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
